CompanyProfile.title: CompanyProfile
CompanyProfile.description: Stores the fixed information of the company 'Dubai Tools' that issues invoices.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CompanyProfile entity.

name.description: The registered name of the company, e.g., 'DUBAI TOOLS'.

addressLine1.description: The primary street address of the company.

addressLine2.description: Optional secondary address information for the company.

city.description: The city where the company is located.

state.description: The state or province where the company is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the company's address.

phoneNumbers.description: A list of phone numbers for the company.

email.description: The primary email address for the company.

gstRegistrationNumber.description: The Goods and Services Tax (GST) or other relevant registration number for the company.

defaultInvoiceNotes.description: Default notes or terms to be included on new invoices.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores personal profile information for the authenticated user.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer to whom invoices are issued.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

name.description: The full name or company name of the customer.

contactPerson.description: The name of a primary contact person for company customers (optional).

email.description: The primary email address of the customer.

phoneNumbers.description: A list of phone numbers for the customer.

addressLine1.description: The primary street address of the customer.

addressLine2.description: Optional secondary address information for the customer.

city.description: The city where the customer is located.

state.description: The state or province where the company is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the customer's address.

gstRegistrationNumber.description: Optional Goods and Services Tax (GST) or other relevant registration number for the customer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the customer record was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a single invoice issued by Dubai Tools to a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

invoiceNumber.description: The unique, automatically generated invoice number.

invoiceDate.description: The date the invoice was issued.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who is being invoiced. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Invoice)

companyProfileId.description: Reference to the CompanyProfile that issued the invoice. (Relationship: CompanyProfile 1:N Invoice)

subtotalAmount.description: The sum of all line item amounts before tax, for the entire invoice.

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax calculated across all line items for the entire invoice.

grandTotalAmount.description: The grand total amount for the invoice (Subtotal + Total Tax).

notes.description: Optional notes or terms for the invoice, such as payment instructions.

authorizedSignatureName.description: The name of the person who authorized the invoice.

status.description: The current status of the invoice (e.g., 'Draft', 'Sent', 'Paid', 'Overdue', 'Cancelled').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the invoice record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the invoice record was last updated.

InvoiceLineItem.title: InvoiceLineItem
InvoiceLineItem.description: Represents a single itemized entry within an invoice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceLineItem entity.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice this line item belongs to. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N InvoiceLineItem)

description.description: A description of the item or service provided.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

rate.description: The rate per unit of the item or service.

tax.description: The applicable tax percentage for this specific line item (e.g., 5, 10, 18).

definition.description: Stores the user's personal profile information.
Stores the company profile information for the user.
Contains customer records for the user.
Stores all invoice documents for the user.
Contains individual line items for a specific invoice.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed for a multi-tenant application where each user's data is isolated. Data is stored under a top-level `users` collection, and each document within that collection is keyed by the user's UID. This ensures that a user can only access their own data, which is enforced by Firestore security rules. This approach is secure, scalable, and provides strong data isolation between users.
